---
title: "Discussions"
description: "Discussion space for ISA RC42 Social Psychology members."
---

## Discussions

RC42 Social Psychology recognizes the value of open scholarly discussion and community exchange.

### Current Status

::: {.info-box}
**Discussions are not active yet.** This section is reserved for a future discussion space that the RC42 board may evaluate in upcoming phases.
:::

### Future Options Under Consideration

The RC42 board may evaluate the following platforms for community discussions, depending on member interest and moderation capacity:

- **GitHub Discussions** — Integrated with the site's repository; suitable for structured, topic-based threads.
- **giscus** — A comment system powered by GitHub Discussions, allowing page-level comments.
- **Discord** — Real-time messaging; suitable for informal exchanges and community building.
- **Discourse** — A full-featured forum platform; requires dedicated hosting and moderation.

### Guiding Principles

A discussion space should only be activated if:

1. **Sustained participation** — There is demonstrated interest from a sufficient number of members to maintain active, meaningful exchanges.
2. **Moderation capacity** — There are volunteers or designated moderators willing and able to maintain a respectful, scholarly environment.
3. **Clear purpose** — The discussion space serves a need not already met by email, conferences, or other existing channels.
4. **Sustainability** — The chosen platform can be maintained over time without excessive technical or administrative burden.

### In the Meantime

For questions, suggestions, or discussions, members are encouraged to:

- Contact the RC42 board at [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org)
- Engage during RC42 sessions at ISA conferences
- Use the [contribution form](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd) to share ideas

::: {.placeholder-notice}
This page will be updated if and when a discussion platform is adopted by the RC42 board.
:::
